title: Reading Order Test: Two Columns Across Pages
purpose: Exercise Layer 0 reading-order preservation across two-column layouts and page boundaries. Markers 01-20 are explicit sequential anchors; topical nouns (telescope, kettle, compass, lantern, harpoon, anchor, sextant) provide content-based order references.
catalog_cells_exercised: Layer 0 / content presence / sequential markers / correctly_used
Layer 1 / italic / topical nouns via \emph / correctly_used
ground_truth_basis: source.tex (authored deterministically) + visual spot-check of source.pdf (verified 2026-04-22). Source-anchored ground truth is reliable here because the rendering pipeline is stock article.cls + pdflatex, which the source-fidelity-test experiment confirmed faithful for catalog features.

files.source.pdf: Rendered output (this is the PDF converters consume)
